## Safety and migration impact

- [ ] No automatic-control safety semantics changed, or impact is documented and tested.
- [ ] No startup/reload/migration/preview path can actuate unexpectedly.

## Documentation and UI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated.
- [ ] No production entities, secrets, or private diagnostics were used.
- [ ] Dependency/licence impact was reviewed.
